summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features for Black Star Threads eCommerce platform - all core functionality working correctly

minor.issue: Product detail response does not include vote_count field for products created before voting feature was added. The votes endpoint works correctly.

design_issues.screen: Product Detail - More from Designer section
issues: Some product images in 'More from this designer' section show unrelated stock photos (backpack, sneakers) instead of jersey images - this is a data/content issue, not a code issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, category grid, voting banner, and multiple sections
Navigation menu works - all category links (Official Tournament, Streetwear, Fan, Retro, Creative Designer)
Product detail page shows voting functionality - Vote button, vote count display
Voting API endpoint POST /api/products/{product_id}/vote works correctly
Vote count updates in real-time after voting
Button changes from 'Vote' to 'Voted' after voting
Toast notification shows 'Vote recorded! Thanks for voting.'
Product detail page shows 'More from this designer' section when designer has multiple products
'List Your Jersey' button in hero section links to /sell page
/sell page (SellYourJerseyPage) loads correctly with 'How It Works' steps and payment info
/terms page loads correctly with Terms and Conditions content
/privacy page loads correctly with Privacy Policy content
/compare page loads and allows selecting two jerseys for comparison
Footer contains links to Terms and Privacy pages
Top voted product API endpoint GET /api/products/top-voted works
GET /api/vendor/{vendor_id}/products returns designer's products
GET /api/products/categories returns all 6 categories
Admin login with provided credentials works
Newsletter subscription endpoint works
Ghana flag border (red, yellow, green lines) visible at top of header
action_items: Consider adding vote_count field to product detail response for consistency (currently only available via /api/products/{product_id}/votes endpoint)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (voting, /sell, /terms, /privacy, /compare pages) are working correctly. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py. The voting functionality works end-to-end - vote count updates, button state changes, and toast notifications appear. The 'More from this designer' section appears on product detail pages when the vendor has multiple products.
